rows.label: xs33400110_MSG0020
rows.name: It flew off with a whoosh, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33400110_MSG0030
rows.name:
It looked like a tower, but it was really
some kind of flying weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33400110_MSG0040
rows.name: Or perhaps we should call it a "spear."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33400110_MSG0050
rows.name:
I'm not certain how much effect
that will have on Void, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33400110_MSG0060
rows.name:
Just to be sure, let's go check
the other "spears" as well.[ST:wait ]
